cause_analysis.narrative: Escape Med Spa churned on 2026-03-18 after 223 days with Zoca. On 2026-01-07 they raised a results concern ("not seeing results"), which was never fully resolved. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 47 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-04-15 via sms, client wrote: "Hello, this is Escape Day Spa Playa Vista. We are currently unable to answer the phone right now, but we will call you b…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

messages.body: Hi there

Hello, this is Escape Day Spa Playa Vista. We are currently unable to answer the phone right now, but we will call you back as soon as possible! Please visit our website for online booking and more information ! https://escapespala.com/book-now/?region=cv
I'm sorry we couldn't get to the phone right now, if you're calling during business hours we must be helping the customer and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
Yes Fernanda
For all locations? Correct ?
Hey Fernanda, I hope you’re well! We have already cancelled the subscription for you.

I am really sorry to hear that you wish to cancel. We truly value you and your business, and we would appreciate it if you could help us understand the reason behind this decision. Your feedback helps us improve and ensures we close things in a way that supports your business long-term.
Hi! Just to confirm, your account has already been cancelled as per your request. Wishing you all the best ahead. Please feel free to reach out if you ever need anything.

For all the locations? Correct ?
We are not finding the value on the service . Make sure this is taken care today
